subcodes.title: Words to Goodall, Wise and Cooper, spoken on 1912-07-20
subcodes.first_line: I have come to these parts and I find out that certain people have attributed to me certain statements of which I am innocent… Any one quoting me must have authority written either with my own hand, or Tablets signed with my seal.
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @importance of authoritative interpretation, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @firmness in the Covenant
